prompt: A 5 gallon white bucket brimming with dark, finished compost sits on a patio. The compost looks moist but crumbly with no visible sticks, steam-free and smelling earthy. A compost thermometer is resting across the rim and a small hand trowel is leaned nearby. Scene is a bright, solarpunk garden nook with green plants in soft focus. Photorealistic, 512x512, no logos or text.
